response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but the role requires principal-level hardware performance architecture expertise — SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. The closest relevant experience is low-latency DLang services and some embedded exposure, which falls well short of the required deep-learning workload and silicon architecture background.
strengths: 18+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Low-latency systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) handling millions of requests/second
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, and community teaching
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance analysis experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not silicon or accelerator architecture

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware co-design experience
No AI accelerator or DNN workload optimization background
